description: Clicking 'Begin Your Story' button should open a template selection modal instead of navigating directly to login
steps_to_verify: Navigate to landing page at http://localhost:3000
Click 'Begin Your Story' button in hero section
Verify a modal appears showing available templates
Verify modal does NOT navigate away from landing page

description: Template selection modal should display all available templates with preview images and names
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Verify at least 2 templates are displayed
Verify each template shows a preview thumbnail
Verify each template shows its name
Verify each template has a 'Select' or 'Use Template' button

description: Selecting a template should navigate to login with template parameter preserved
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Click 'Select' on any template
Verify navigation to /login?template=<template-id>
After login, verify redirected to /builder?template=<template-id>

description: Template selection modal should have a close/cancel button to dismiss without selecting
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Click close (X) button or click outside modal
Verify modal closes
Verify user remains on landing page

description: Builder always requires template selection - even returning users must select template (existing invitations accessed via profile)
steps_to_verify: Navigate directly to /builder without template param (when logged in)
Verify user is redirected to landing page OR shown template selection
Verify blank canvas is never displayed as starting state
Verify existing invitations are NOT auto-loaded - user must go to profile to access them
notes: Users with no existing invitation and no template param are redirected to landing page. Users with existing invitations can access their work directly.

description: Create 'Golden Happiness' template with traditional Chinese wedding design - red background, double happiness symbol, gold accents
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Verify 'Golden Happiness' template appears in list
Select template and enter builder
Verify red/burgundy background color (#8B1538 or similar)
Verify double happiness symbol (囍) is present
Verify gold accent color is applied to decorative elements

description: Golden Happiness template should include all required sections: hero, photos, countdown, venue, RSVP
steps_to_verify: Select 'Golden Happiness' template and enter builder
Verify Hero section exists with couple names placeholder
Verify Photo section(s) exist
Verify Save the Date / Countdown section exists
Verify Venue/Map section exists
Verify RSVP form section exists
notes: Template data contains all required section data (scheduleBlocks, notes, preview data), but canvas editor doesn't auto-render sections. Needs structured editor mode or auto-generation of canvas sections.

description: Create 'Sparkling Celebration' template - same as Golden Happiness but with sparkle particle animation enabled
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Verify 'Sparkling Celebration' template appears in list
Select template and enter builder
Verify sparkle/particle animation is visible
Verify decorativeSettings.sparkles is true in template data
notes: Template exists with sparkles: true in decorativeElements. Sparkle animation visibility depends on preview rendering.

description: Template thumbnails in selection modal should accurately represent the template design
steps_to_verify: Open template selection modal
Compare thumbnail preview to actual template
Verify colors match between preview and actual template
Verify layout style is recognizable in preview
notes: Templates display heroImageUrl as preview thumbnail which represents the template style.

description: New templates should be categorized as 'chinese-traditional' for filtering
steps_to_verify: Check template data in src/lib/templates/chinese-traditional.ts
Verify both new templates have category: 'chinese-traditional'
If category filter exists in modal, verify templates appear under Chinese Traditional

description: Profile page should list user's existing invitations with option to continue editing
steps_to_verify: Login and navigate to profile page
Verify list of existing invitations is displayed (if any)
Each invitation shows name/preview
Each invitation has 'Continue Editing' or 'Edit' button
Clicking edit button navigates to /builder with that invitation loaded
notes: Profile page does not exist yet. This is a feature that needs to be implemented.
